series_metadata.series_description: Records contain budget documents related to annual expenditures for personnel and benefits, equipment, services (includes personal contracts, training, and temporary staffing), and maintenance (includes, supplies, travel, telecommunication costs). Records detailing budget narratives, expenditure justification, and cost breakdowns showing how appropriations are allocated. Files include executive budget proposals; internal budget plans and projections; bid proposals; copies of purchase orders and invoices; reports and supportive documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office end of biennium and in records center 3 years ; Electronic: in office superseded, obsolete or replaced
